title: cynometra bourdillonii
intro: Cynometra bourdillonii, also known as the Ceylon ironwood, is a species of tree in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Cynometra bourdillonii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infectious diseases, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Cynometra bourdillonii is typically prepared in herbal form, such as a decoction or infusion, or as a powder for use in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
